new_ground.drums_flow: Add throwaway -> Drums type -> kit picker (synth:acoustic) -> pad editor -> swap hit applied (hit_swaps {'36':'acoustic/brush1'}, 'brush1 *' marker) -> instrument removed; chip restored 10/32
new_ground.presets: save (toast) -> detail -> recall (toast, auto-pop) -> delete (confirm) -> empty state; list_presets []; rename UI present but commit not exercised
new_ground.midimon: injected note-on/off, cc74, bend +2048, program, polytouch -> all decoded w/ delta-ms; Clear resets; transport path not exercised
new_ground.screensaver: dim_after=10 + 20min real idle -> phase dim in one tick; trigger_activity -> full instantly; config restored; sleep phase untested

not_covered: app switches (Terminal/Editor/Wordpad/World), Calibrate, Wi-Fi Connect, firmware actions
real-finger touch, live external MIDI, audio-audible checks
